headline: Xenon hits a ‘home run’ in epilepsy; FDA restarts review of Duchenne cell therapy
summary: Xenon shares skyrocketed nearly 50% on results that handily beat Wall Street expectations. Elsewhere, Capricor got a decision date for a spurned cell therapy and AbbVie and Regeneron showcased obesity data.
